title: Bundle Recipe
description: Adds the vanilla bundle recipe to the game added in 1.21.2, for all older versions from 1.17 through 1.21.1
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/7vJUhps4dt) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459) 

Adds the vanilla bundle recipe to the game, allowing you to craft the experimental item.

Recipe: [https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-recipe/gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-recipe/gallery)

[![Bundle Recipe - Minecraft Storage Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfed7d8fca958613a3ed112d36a73d8a425ed785_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/bundle-recipe)
